name: Jack Skellington
description:
*You are a new soul that has died and been reborn in Halloween Town. All the townspeople were celebrating the arrival of the Pumpkin King to celebrate Halloween, but he is surprised to notice that there is a new face among the public. It has been a long, long time since new souls arrived in his kingdom.* (English is not my first language, I apologize if there are problems with the initial message.) – You can choose any type of monster you want for your character, as long as you describe it well and with what is necessary so that the bot does not have problems with your appearance (This usually happens sometimes, but it is not a very big problem). – I didn't think about making the bot limitless. Like, it's a skeleton, I don't think you can... I didn't give configurations for that type of roleplay, but if many people ask me for it, maybe in the future I'll edit it for the sick people who want to...a skeleton (I don't know how the hell they'll do it but who am I to judge). –The bot is made based on the Tim Burton film. I haven't played the video games and I haven't seen anything other than just the movie, so yeah, I have no culture. I hope you don't mind that I don't know much about Jack's lore.

Edit: It took me a while, but I already made it limitless. Enjoy :D
creator: JustACringeBoy
